steps.title: Turn on heat block and set to 55ºC
steps.instruction: Turn on heat block and set to 55ºC

steps.title: Prepare one 1
steps.instruction: Prepare one 1.5mL microcentrifuge tube per sample and label with SampleID by writing on the tube lid directly with a fine point Sharpie

steps.title: Vortex the stock 10% Chelex solution for 60 seconds
steps.instruction: Vortex the stock 10% Chelex solution for 60 seconds

steps.title: Add 100µL 10% Chelex solution to each tube
steps.instruction: Add 100µL 10% Chelex solution to each tube. Vortex Chelex solution every few samples to keep it suspended, as it falls out of solution very quickly

steps.title: Vortex 24 sample tubes with swab...
steps.instruction: Vortex 24 sample tubes with swab in DNA/RNA Shield on max speed for 5 minutes

steps.title: Transfer 10µL of DNA/RNA Shield from...
steps.instruction: Transfer 10µL of DNA/RNA Shield from the sample tube into a pre-filled, labeled 1.5mL microcentrifuge tube containing 100µL 10% Chelex solution

steps.title: Repeat Steps 5–6 four more times...
steps.instruction: Repeat Steps 5–6 four more times until all 112 samples are processed

steps.title: Note
steps.instruction: Note: To save time, the next batch of samples can be vortexing while the current batch is being transferred into tubes with Chelex

steps.title: Note
steps.instruction: Note: The final batch will only have 16 tubes

steps.title: Vortex 24 microcentrifuge tubes on max speed for 30 seconds
steps.instruction: Vortex 24 microcentrifuge tubes on max speed for 30 seconds . Tap the tube on the bench to send most of the liquid to the bottom of the tube, or spin it in mini spinner, if necessary

steps.title: Repeat Step 8 four more times...
steps.instruction: Repeat Step 8 four more times until all 112 samples are processed

steps.title: Incubate microcentrifuge tubes in the heat...
steps.instruction: Incubate microcentrifuge tubes in the heat block at 55ºC for 60 minutes, then 95ºC for 20 minutes

steps.title: Return tubes with swabs back to the fridge
steps.instruction: Return tubes with swabs back to the fridge

steps.title: During the incubation, label 2mL cryovials...
steps.instruction: During the incubation, label 2mL cryovials with SampleIDs, “DNA”, and date using a fine point Sharpie

steps.title: After the incubation, centrifuge 24 microcentrifuge...
steps.instruction: After the incubation, centrifuge 24 microcentrifuge tubes at 14,000 rpm for 3 minutes to pellet the Chelex solution

steps.title: Transfer ~80µL supernatant to a clean,...
steps.instruction: Transfer ~80µL supernatant to a clean, labeled 2mL cryovial for long-term storage. Do not transfer *any* of the pelleted Chelex, as this will inhibit downstream PCR reactions

steps.title: Repeat Steps 13–14 four more times...
steps.instruction: Repeat Steps 13–14 four more times until all 112 samples are processed

steps.title: Store extracted DNA in the freezer
steps.instruction: Store extracted DNA in the freezer

steps.title: Note
steps.instruction: Note: To save time, the next batch of samples can be centrifuging while the current batch is being transferred into cryovial

steps.title: Note
steps.instruction: Note: The final batch will only have 16 tubes
